zh.title: 以太坊/美元技术分析：短期震荡偏弱整理
zh.content:
当前ETH/USD价格在1640.26附近震荡，较SMA(20)1662.56仍有一定下行压力，短期走势呈现弱势整理格局。日内高低点1644.14/1632.31显示多空力量相对平衡，但价格连续低于20日均线，显示短期多头动能不足。  

MACD当前值为-7.86842，处于零轴下方，表明短线空方占优，但缺少Signal线参考，仍需关注后续指标交叉情况。若价格未能有效突破SMA(20)，空方可能继续施压，短线维持震荡偏弱策略较为稳妥。  

支撑位方面可关注近期低点1632附近，如跌破该位置，可能下探1620区域。阻力位则在1662-1665一线，如突破则有望测试1680附近高点。结合技术指标与均线压力，短线操作应以防守为主，低位可考虑小幅逢低布局。  

交易建议上，保持谨慎观望，建议追踪关键支撑与阻力突破信号。若价格回落至1632-1635附近且出现反弹信号，可尝试短线多单，止损设置在支撑下方；若上破1665-1670，可顺势轻仓跟进多单，但需控制仓位与风险，切勿追高操作。

en.title: Ethereum vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
Ethereum is trading at 1640.26, remaining under pressure after failing to reclaim its 20-day simple moving average at 1662.56. The current price sits roughly 1.3% below this medium-term trend benchmark, indicating that bearish momentum still dominates the broader short-term structure. With the daily range confined between 1632.31 and 1644.14, price action suggests consolidation rather than aggressive directional movement, reflecting market indecision near key technical levels.

The MACD reading of -7.87 points to persistent negative momentum, even though the absence of a signal-line value limits confirmation of crossover dynamics. A negative MACD generally indicates that sellers retain control and that upward moves may face resistance until momentum improves. The unavailable RSI prevents a direct assessment of overbought or oversold conditions, but current price behavior suggests a neutral-to-bearish market environment rather than an exhausted selloff.

From a technical perspective, immediate support is located near 1632, the recent session low. A break below this area could expose Ethereum to further downside toward the psychologically important 1600 zone. On the upside, resistance appears near 1645, followed by the more significant barrier around the 20-day SMA at 1663. A sustained move above that moving average would improve sentiment and potentially open the path toward the 1680–1700 region.

Traders may consider maintaining a cautious stance while ETH remains below the 20-day SMA. Short-term participants could look for buying opportunities only if price stabilizes above 1645 and momentum indicators begin to strengthen. Conversely, a failure to hold 1632 may favor bearish continuation strategies with disciplined risk management. Given the current consolidation phase, waiting for a confirmed breakout or breakdown may offer a more favorable risk-to-reward setup than anticipating direction prematurely.
